home.hero_subtitle: Explore artworks, monuments, and heritage with a focused AI guide built for real visits.

conversations.subtitle: Your recent museum sessions. Pull down to refresh.
conversations.empty_saved: No saved sessions yet. Long-press a session to save it.
conversations.empty_body: Start a new conversation from Home to create your first session.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your Musaium preferences, privacy information, and support access.
settings.env_note: Backend environment is build-driven (local/preview/production), not user-selectable.
settings.guided_experience_subtitle: Understand how guided mode changes explanations, next-stop suggestions, and response depth during museum visits.
settings.privacy_desc: Read data processing, rights, and legal contacts.
settings.terms_desc: Read our terms and conditions of use.
settings.support_desc: Contact support through Instagram or Telegram channels.
settings.onboarding_desc: Revisit usage flow, practical tips, and help shortcuts.
settings.danger_zone_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.delete_confirm_body: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.ai_memory_hint: Uses your art preferences and visit history to personalize AI responses
settings.audio_description_hint: Read AI responses aloud with rich visual descriptions for accessibility

content_preferences.title: What you like to learn
content_preferences.subtitle: Pick the aspects you care about most. The AI will emphasize them when relevant, without forcing them on you.

artist.label: Artist biography
artist.hint: Life of the artist, influences, evolution

dataMode.title: Data saving mode
dataMode.description: The app detects your connection quality

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.error_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

change_email.title: Change Email
change_email.success: Check your new email for a verification link
change_email.error_taken: This email is already in use

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Control language, guided museum mode, and explanation depth for art conversations.
preferences.language_hint: Used for AI response language and timestamp formatting in the chat.
preferences.museum_mode_hint: Adds next-step recommendations and museum navigation cues.
preferences.guide_level_hint: Beginner keeps explanations simple. Expert uses art-history vocabulary.

slide0.title: Welcome to Musaium
slide0.subtitle: Your personal museum guide. Photograph artworks or ask questions to get AI-powered insights.
slide0.tip1: Open Home and choose Discover, Camera, Audio, or Start Conversation.
slide0.tip2: Tap Camera to photograph an artwork and get an AI analysis.
slide0.tip3: Tap Audio to ask your question out loud.
slide0.tip4: Visit Dashboard to revisit saved or recent conversations.

slide1.title: Practical Tips
slide1.subtitle: Get better museum answers with focused image and audio inputs.
slide1.tip1: Frame one artwork or one detail at a time for cleaner analysis.
slide1.tip2: Ask art-focused questions (artist, style, period, symbolism).
slide1.tip3: Use Guided Museum Mode for next-stop suggestions during visits.
slide1.tip4: Choose Beginner or Expert guide level for vocabulary depth.

slide2.title: Help and Support
slide2.subtitle: Find support channels and privacy information quickly.
slide2.tip1: Use Support for account issues, bugs, and feedback.
slide2.tip2: Privacy page shows data processing information and your rights.
slide2.tip3: Settings is a hub for navigation and account actions.
slide2.tip4: Your data is processed securely with GDPR compliance.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Contact Musaium support through our social channels.
support.manual_open: Please open {{url}} manually or update the support channel configuration.
support.scope_topics: Supported topics: account access, app bugs, feature feedback, and guided museum experience issues.
support.scope_team: All support requests are handled by the Musaium team.
support.invalid_link_body: The {{label}} link is not configured correctly.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Explore artworks and monuments with the fastest entry points: photo analysis, voice question, or your recent sessions.
discover.photo_title: Take a Photo of an Artwork
discover.photo_desc: Launch the camera directly and ask Musaium to analyze an artwork, monument, or cultural detail.
discover.voice_desc: Start an audio-first chat to record a spoken question while visiting a museum or monument.
discover.continue_desc: Open your dashboard to resume previous art sessions, saved chats, and recent interpretations.
discover.guided_desc: Learn how guided mode adds next-stop suggestions and richer context for museum visits.

guidedMode.title: Guided Museum Mode
guidedMode.subtitle: Guided mode turns Musaium into a museum companion: it explains the artwork and suggests a relevant next step for your visit.
guidedMode.card1_text: Musaium adds practical museum-oriented guidance such as the next stop, transitions between rooms, and observation prompts tied to nearby works or monuments.
guidedMode.card2_text: Standard mode stays concise and descriptive. Guided mode remains art-focused but actively supports your path through an exhibition or cultural site.
guidedMode.card3_text: Beginner uses simple educational language. Intermediate introduces short technical terms. Expert adds deeper art-history vocabulary and context.
guidedMode.card4_text: Example guided behavior: explain brushwork, connect the piece to its historical movement, then suggest a nearby work to compare composition or symbolism.
guidedMode.turn_off: Go to Preferences to Turn Off Guided Mode
guidedMode.turn_on: Go to Preferences to Turn On Guided Mode

privacy.subtitle: This page explains how Musaium processes personal data, user rights under GDPR/RGPD, and how to contact support for privacy requests.
privacy.prerelease_text: These items should be validated before publishing to stores or production users.
privacy.request_text: For access, deletion, rectification, or objection requests, contact the team via the support page and include "privacy request" in your message until a dedicated legal workflow is finalized.

consent.title: AI-Generated Responses
consent.body: The responses you receive are produced by artificial intelligence. They may contain inaccuracies or errors. Always verify important information independently.
consent.info_accuracy: Responses may be inaccurate — always cross-check critical facts.
consent.info_privacy: Your data is processed in accordance with our privacy policy.
consent.info_report: You can report any problematic response using the flag button.
consent.data_audio: Voice messages (transcribed only, audio not stored by AI)
consent.data_location: Your location (if you choose to share it)
consent.data_profile: Your art preferences and visit history (to personalize responses)
